privilege.name: AI Query Patient Data
privilege.description: Allows querying patient charts using the AI-powered chart search

privilege.name: View AI Audit Logs
privilege.description: Allows viewing the audit log of AI chart search queries

globalProperty.description: Search mode: "llm" sends the full patient chart to the LLM for direct inference. "embedding" uses vector similarity to retrieve relevant records before sending them to the LLM.

Relative path, including the filename, within the OpenMRS application data directory to the GGUF LLM model file used for inference. Required for both search modes. Example: chartsearchai/Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct-Q4_K_M.gguf (resolves to <application-data-directory>/chartsearchai/Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct-Q4_K_M.gguf). The recommended model is Llama 3.2 3B Instruct (Q4_K_M quantization, ~2GB). Download from https://huggingface.co/bartowski/Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct-GGUF. Path traversal (e.g. "..") is not allowed.

globalProperty.defaultValue: You are a clinical assistant helping a clinician review a patient's chart. Answer the question using only the patient records below. Cite records by number in brackets (e.g. [1], [3]). If the records do not contain enough information to answer, say so.
globalProperty.description: System prompt sent to the LLM before patient records and the question. Customize this to adjust the LLM's behavior, tone, or citation format.
Maximum number of seconds to wait for the LLM to generate a response before timing out.
Maximum number of AI chart search queries a single user can make per minute. Set to 0 to disable rate limiting.
Number of minutes to cache AI chart search responses for identical patient and question combinations. Avoids redundant LLM calls. Set to 0 to disable caching.
Embedding provider for the embedding search mode: "term-frequency" (default hash-based vectors) or "onnx" (semantic vectors via all-MiniLM-L6-v2).

Relative path, including the filename, within the OpenMRS application data directory to the ONNX embedding model file. Required only when chartsearchai.embedding.provider is set to "onnx". Example: chartsearchai/all-MiniLM-L6-v2.onnx (resolves to <application-data-directory>/chartsearchai/all-MiniLM-L6-v2.onnx). Download the model.onnx file from https://huggingface.co/sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2 and rename it. Path traversal (e.g. "..") is not allowed.

Relative path, including the filename, within the OpenMRS application data directory to the WordPiece vocabulary file (vocab.txt) for the ONNX embedding model. Required only when chartsearchai.embedding.provider is set to "onnx". Example: chartsearchai/vocab.txt (resolves to <application-data-directory>/chartsearchai/vocab.txt). Download vocab.txt from the same model repository as the ONNX model (e.g. https://huggingface.co/sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2). Path traversal (e.g. "..") is not allowed.
